name: Ayatollah Khamenei
significance: Ultimate decision authority. Authorized retaliatory strikes. Controls IRGC directly.

name: Esmail Qaani
significance: Commands Iran's external operations and proxy networks. Location unknown since strikes began.

name: Hossein Salami
significance: Overall IRGC military commander. Directing missile and drone operations.

name: Benjamin Netanyahu
significance: War cabinet chair. Authorized joint strikes with US. Managing multi-front defense.

name: Yoav Gallant
significance: Directing IDF operations across all fronts. Key liaison with US CENTCOM.

name: Lloyd Austin
significance: Directing US military operations. Managing carrier strike group deployments in Gulf and Red Sea.

name: Naim Qassem
significance: Directing Hezbollah rocket campaign against northern Israel. Coordinating with IRGC Quds Force.

name: Abdul-Malik al-Houthi
significance: Directing anti-ship operations in Red Sea and Bab el-Mandeb. Coordinating with Iran.

name: Mohammed bin Salman
significance: Managing Saudi security posture. Balancing defense of oil infrastructure with diplomatic channels.

name: Rafael Grossi
significance: Leading international nuclear monitoring efforts. Seeking restored access to Iranian sites.
